mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.user1_id, c.user2_id, c.last_message_id, c.last_message_at, c.created_at, c.updated_at, CASE WHEN c.user1_id = #{userId} THEN c.user2_id ELSE c.user1_id END as other_user_id, u.username as other_username, u.nickname as other_nickname, u.avatar_url as other_avatar_url, m.id as last_msg_id, m.content as last_msg_content, m.type as last_msg_type, m.sender_id as last_msg_sender_id, m.status as last_msg_status, m.created_at as last_msg_created_at FROM conversations c INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = CASE WHEN c.user1_id = #{userId} THEN c.user2_id ELSE c.user1_id END LEFT JOIN messages m ON m.id = c.last_message_id WHERE (c.user1_id = #{userId} OR c.user2_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY c.last_message_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO conversations (user1_id, user2_id, last_message_id, last_message_at) VALUES (#{user1Id}, #{user2Id}, #{lastMessageId}, #{lastMessageAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE conversations SET last_message_id = #{lastMessageId}, last_message_at = #{lastMessageAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
